data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Users spend most of their time on other sites, aligning familiar design patterns was critical.
data.technical_spec: Consistent UI components, standard navigation patterns.

data.title: Miller's Law
data.description: Recognizes the limited ability to process information, ensuring clear and concise communication.

data.title: Fitts' Law
data.description: Optimized touch targets for mobile devices to improve usability.
data.technical_spec: Large, easily tappable buttons and controls.

data.title: Tesler’s Law
data.description: Simplification of learning and execution tasks keeps the user focus intact.
data.technical_spec: Avoidance of unnecessary complexity, intuitive gesture controls.

data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: Reduction of choices per screen to streamline decision-making.
